text: Attorney Joshua B. Watkins of Burrill Watkins LLC was publicly reprimanded, disqualified from the case, and sanctioned a combined $47,056.90 after forensic examination of his firm's ChatGPT Business Plan workspace confirmed hallucinated citations in filings. Counsel admitted generative-AI use and the court made an independent finding of false statements of law. The order was published in the Federal Supplement; the Bar was notified.
canonical_source_conflicted: Non-existent federal case citations; genuine federal civil rights and landlord-tenant law
mitigation_gap: Attorney used ChatGPT to draft legal briefs and filed without verifying citations; forensic examination of the firm's ChatGPT workspace confirmed the AI origin.
reliance_or_harm: $35,603.90 to Fite Defendants + $11,453 to Triad Defendants = $47,056.90; public reprimand; disqualification; Bar referral; order published.
